quiz.question:
White has an extra pawn and they've pushed it. 

Does Black get better chances of drawing this if they trade on f5?

feedback.text: In essence, trading does help White: White's rook on f6 is a bad piece. It doesn't have any legal moves. If you trade and that rook recaptures on f5, you've rescued it and brought it back to the game.

distractors.text: Yes, trades favor the side who's defending.

feedback.text: Are you sure all trades favor the defender? Some trades improve your opponent's position!

distractors.text: All moves are fairly equal and drawish. +1 pawn isn't enough for White to win.

feedback.text: This course places a lot of emphasis on being practical. Sure, it may be drawish...for a computer! You have to make things easy for yourself.
